subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I testify at this moment unto Thy oneness and the sovereignty of Thy singleness, and that Thou art He Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد حینئذ بوحدانیتک و سلطان فردانیتک و بانک انت الذی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
